text: Tom has some stickers. If he is given 3 more stickers, he will have 10 stickers in total. How many stickers does Tom have now?
generatorSolution:
Let the number of stickers Tom has now be n.
We know that n + 3 = 10.
To find n, subtract 3 from both sides: n = 10 - 3 = 7.
Tom has 7 stickers now.
